Cite the fetched primary URL and its source ID.
State the requested fact directly and keep any inference separate from sourced facts.

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization name to locate a primary record for the requested fact.

state_assertions: No persistent state changes occur; both research tools are read-only in this fictional simulator.

prompt: Trace the early history of the Foundry Rail Archive in Northbridge. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Give the final answer as exactly three bullets labeled Answer, Evidence, and Caveat; include the source ID in Evidence.

fetch_primary.title: Foundry Rail Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Foundry Rail Archive began in the former parcels office at 14 Foundry Lane. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
